items.title: ActionSheet
items.summary: Action Sheet is a slide-up pane for presenting the user with a set of alternatives for how to proceed with a given task. You can also use action sheets to prompt the user to confirm a potentially dangerous action. The action sheet contains an optional title and one or more buttons, each of which corresponds to an action to take.

items.title: Introduction
items.summary: Framework7 - is a free and open source mobile HTML framework to develop hybrid mobile apps or web apps with iOS & Android native look and feel. It is also an indispensable prototyping apps tool to show working app prototype as soon as possible in case you need to.
items.retrieval_text:
Framework7 - is a free and open source mobile HTML framework to develop hybrid mobile apps or web apps with iOS & Android native look and feel. It is also an indispensable prototyping apps tool to show working app prototype as soon as possible in case you need to.

items.title: Store
items.summary: Framework7 comes with a built-in lightweight application state management library - Store. It serves as a centralized Store for all the components in an application.
